repair_candidate.summary: Raise a credited replacement PR for the narrow memory-core node:sqlite unavailable error-message fix from #69199, because the useful contributor branch is not maintainer-editable and lacks required merge preflight.
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary

This is a Clownfish replacement for the useful but uneditable contributor PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/69199 by @rrrrrredy.

It keeps the fix scoped to `extensions/memory-core`: detect `node:sqlite` / missing built-in sqlite runtime errors in `buildMemorySearchUnavailableResult`, return actionable guidance for unsupported Node/runtime environments, and keep the existing quota and generic fallback branches intact.

## Credit

Thanks @rrrrrredy for the original implementation and tests in source PR #69199. This replacement preserves attribution for that work and avoids carrying over the unrelated workflow churn from the earlier closed #59637 branch.

## Validation

- `pnpm -s vitest run extensions/memory-core/src/tools.test.ts`
- `pnpm check:changed`

Refs: #69199, #59637, #59457, cluster live-pr-inventory-20260621T094459-023
credit_notes: Credit @rrrrrredy for the original scoped implementation in https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/69199.
Mention that #59637 was the earlier broad branch and #69199 is the clean source PR for the replacement.
Carry attribution in the replacement PR body and any user-facing changelog note.
